title: antidesma baccatum
intro: Antidesma baccatum, also known as the velvet apple or velvet tree, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin issues. The plant's leaves and roots are said to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of these conditions and promote overall health. Antidesma baccatum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for oral consumption, and it can also be applied topically as a paste or salve to take advantage of its health benefits.
